text:
First, note that in 1833, time zones were not standardized as today. However, for this exercise, we assume modern time zone offsets for historical dates (though actual historical timekeeping may differ).  

Asia/Tokyo (JST) = UTC+9  
Australia/Sydney (AEST) = UTC+10 (standard time; August is winter in Sydney, so no DST in modern times).  

Difference: Sydney is 1 hour ahead of Tokyo.  

7:00 in Tokyo → 8:00 same day in Sydney.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 08:00
